entries.note: V64-C reuses the shipped V64-A writable-surface descriptor, repo write lease, exact target admission, and shipped V64-B restoration chain by default.
V64-C adds one advisory writable-surface hardening register only and does not become fresh surface selection, lease issuance, target admission, restoration, or live repo authority.
Committed V64-A and V64-B artifacts outrank narrative interpretation when the V64-C advisory register derives its evidence basis.
V64-C keeps one explicit frozen policy anchor for replayable advisory derivation.
Optional restoration and reintegration carry-through remain explicit, posture-consistent, and fail closed on absent or mismatched basis.
V64-C candidate outcomes remain advisory only, non-entitling, non-escalating, and still require a later lock for scope.
The selected writable-surface path remains exact and non-generalizing by default into broader repo, shell, execute, dispatch, worker, connector, or remote law.
